steps.title: Decide if the graph rises
steps.content: Reading the graph from left to right, the $y$-values increase as $x$ increases. So the function is increasing, not decreasing.

steps.title: Decide if the graph is curved
steps.content: A linear graph is a straight line with constant slope. This graph curves upward and gets steeper, which is the shape of exponential growth.

steps.title: Classify the function
steps.content: The function is increasing and exponential. The answer is C.
